mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id JOIN member m ON r.member_idx = m.member_idx
AND (b.book_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.review_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE review_checked = 'N'
